_comment: Manual overlay for fields the APIs/CSVs don't cover. Provider-direct pricing is TRUTH (AA's prices are marked up). 'train_policy': 'no-train-default'/'no-train-optin'/'trains-by-default'/'unknown'. 'us_hosted_option' = available via a US-based no-train hosted endpoint (Bedrock/Vertex/Azure/Together/Fireworks)? Capability flags vision/function_calling/structured_output are AUTO-DETECTED from OpenRouter in build.py; only supports_fine_tuning + multilingual_tier (1=English-mainly,2=decent,3=strong) are manual. committed_* are ILLUSTRATIVE enterprise rates = list × (1 − band-midpoint discount); NOT quotes. Discount bands (cited, 2026): Anthropic 15-30% off above ~$500K annual commit; OpenAI 25-40% negotiated; cloud provisioned-throughput 15-40% at high utilization. Re-verify quarterly; each row carries last_verified.

anthropic-opus-4.8.committed_assumptions: Illustrative: list × 0.78 (~22% off, midpoint of Anthropic 15-30% enterprise band; needs ~$500K+ annual commit). Bedrock provisioned-throughput is hourly capacity ($40-200/hr) — only beats on-demand above ~50% sustained utilization.
anthropic-opus-4.8.policy_note: API inputs/outputs not used for training by default (commercial terms).

anthropic-sonnet-4.6.committed_assumptions: Illustrative: list × 0.78 (~22% off enterprise band, ~$500K+ commit). Batch API = 50% off for async.

anthropic-haiku-4.5.committed_assumptions: Illustrative: list × 0.78 (~22% off enterprise band). At Haiku's low list, batch (50% off) usually beats a committed discount.

openai-gpt-5.5.committed_assumptions: Illustrative: list × 0.68 (~32% off, midpoint of OpenAI 25-40% negotiated band). Azure PTU ~$2,448/PTU-mo; breakeven vs PAYG ~150-200M tokens/mo at 50%+ utilization.
openai-gpt-5.5.policy_note: API data not used for training; Azure OpenAI is the enterprise no-train route.

openai-gpt-5.4.committed_assumptions: Illustrative: list × 0.68 (~32% off negotiated band). Azure PTU for sustained workloads.

openai-gpt-5.4-nano.committed_assumptions: Illustrative: list × 0.68 (~32% off negotiated band). At this floor, list is already near-marginal-cost; negotiation leverage is low.

google-gemini-3.5-flash.committed_assumptions: Illustrative: list × 0.75 (~25% off, midpoint of Vertex provisioned-throughput 15-40% band at high utilization).
google-gemini-3.5-flash.policy_note: Vertex AI / paid tier: inputs not used for training. Free-tier AI Studio: trains.

google-gemini-3.1-pro.committed_assumptions: Illustrative: list × 0.75 (~25% off Vertex PT band).

moonshot-kimi-k2.6.committed_assumptions: Open weights -> 'committed' = US-host committed tier (Together/Fireworks) or self-host GPU. Practical floor = OpenRouter cheapest-host (see openrouter.spread). Direct Moonshot API has no published committed tier.
moonshot-kimi-k2.6.policy_note: China-origin; Moonshot hosted API train policy unclear. Open weights (unrestricted) per Epoch -> self-host or run via US providers (Together, Fireworks, Groq) under their no-train terms.

deepseek-v4-pro.committed_assumptions: Open weights -> committed = US-host tier or self-host. Practical floor = OpenRouter cheapest-host. NOTE: direct rate reflects a 75% promo that expired 2026-05-31; list may now be ~$1.74/$3.48 — re-verify.
deepseek-v4-pro.promo_note: Direct API rate reflects a 75% promo that expired 2026-05-31; re-verify. List may now be ~$1.74 / $3.48.
deepseek-v4-pro.policy_note: DeepSeek API may use inputs for training per published terms. For enterprise: run via Fireworks/Together (US-hosted, no-train).

deepseek-v4-flash.committed_assumptions: Open weights -> committed = US-host tier or self-host. Practical floor = OpenRouter cheapest-host.

alibaba-qwen-3.6-max.committed_assumptions: Open weights -> committed = US-host tier or self-host. Practical floor = OpenRouter cheapest-host.
alibaba-qwen-3.6-max.policy_note: China-origin; Qwen 3.6-27B open weights (restricted use) per Epoch. Available via OpenRouter and US hosts.

zhipu-glm-5.1.committed_assumptions: Open weights -> committed = US-host tier or self-host. Practical floor = OpenRouter cheapest-host. NOTE: us_hosted_option currently false — verify a US no-train host before recommending for compliance-sensitive use.
zhipu-glm-5.1.policy_note: China-origin; verify Zhipu API train policy.

anthropic-opus-4.7.committed_assumptions: Same enterprise band as Opus 4.8 (~22% off list). 4.7 is the prior flagship.

anthropic-fable-5.committed_assumptions: ASSUMED pricing — Fable 5 sits above Opus tier in Arena ranking; awaiting Anthropic confirmation. Re-verify when public docs land.
anthropic-fable-5.promo_note: Pricing not yet confirmed; estimates based on Arena-rank-implied positioning.
